Bash(node -e "
const fs = require\(''fs''\);
const content = \\`import { PrismaClient } from ''@prisma/client''
import bcrypt from ''bcryptjs''

const prisma = new PrismaClient\(\)

async function main\(\) {
  console.log\(''Starting seed...''\)

  const adminEmail = process.env.ADMIN_EMAIL || ''admin@smartcopons.com''
  const adminPassword = process.env.ADMIN_PASSWORD || ''ChangeThisPassword123!''
  const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash\(adminPassword, 10\)

  await prisma.user.upsert\({
    where: { email: adminEmail },
    update: {},
    create: { email: adminEmail, passwordHash, role: ''ADMIN'' },
  }\)
  console.log\(''Admin user created''\)

  const stores = await Promise.all\([
    prisma.store.upsert\({ where: { slug: ''noon'' }, update: {}, create: { name: ''Noon'', slug: ''noon'', website: ''https://www.noon.com'' } }\),
    prisma.store.upsert\({ where: { slug: ''namshi'' }, update: {}, create: { name: ''Namshi'', slug: ''namshi'', website: ''https://www.namshi.com'' } }\),
    prisma.store.upsert\({ where: { slug: ''amazon-sa'' }, update: {}, create: { name: ''Amazon Saudi Arabia'', slug: ''amazon-sa'', website: ''https://www.amazon.sa'' } }\),
    prisma.store.upsert\({ where: { slug: ''jarir'' }, update: {}, create: { name: ''Jarir Bookstore'', slug: ''jarir'', website: ''https://www.jarir.com'' } }\),
  ]\)
  console.log\(''Stores created:'', stores.length\)

  await prisma.coupon.deleteMany\({}\)
  await Promise.all\([
    prisma.coupon.create\({ data: { title: ''خصم 20% على جميع الأزياء'', code: ''FASHION20'', discountText: ''20% OFF'', url: ''https://www.noon.com'', description: ''احصل على خصم 20% على جميع منتجات الأزياء'', storeId: stores[0].id, isActive: true } }\),
    prisma.coupon.create\({ data: { title: ''شحن مجاني على جميع الطلبات'', code: ''FREESHIP'', discountText: ''شحن مجاني'', url: ''https://www.noon.com'', description: ''شحن مجاني بدون حد أدنى للطلب'', storeId: stores[0].id, isActive: true } }\),
    prisma.coupon.create\({ data: { title: ''خصم 15% على الملابس النسائية'', code: ''WOMEN15'', discountText: ''15% OFF'', url: ''https://www.namshi.com'', description: ''خصم حصري على جميع الملابس النسائية'', storeId: stores[1].id, isActive: true } }\),
    prisma.coupon.create\({ data: { title: ''خصم 100 ريال على أول طلب'', code: ''FIRST100'', discountText: ''100 ر.س خصم'', url: ''https://www.namshi.com'', description: ''خصم 100 ريال سعودي على طلبك الأول'', storeId: stores[1].id, isActive: true } }\),
    prisma.coupon.create\({ data: { title: ''خصم 10% على الإلكترونيات'', code: ''TECH10'', discountText: ''10% OFF'', url: ''https://www.amazon.sa'', description: ''وفر 10% على جميع الأجهزة الإلكترونية'', storeId: stores[2].id, isActive: true } }\),
    prisma.coupon.create\({ data: { title: ''خصم 5% على الكتب والقرطاسية'', code: ''JARIR5'', discountText: ''5% OFF'', url: ''https://www.jarir.com'', description: ''خصم على جميع الكتب والأدوات المكتبية'', storeId: stores[3].id, isActive: true } }\),
  ]\)
  console.log\(''Coupons created''\)

  const categoryDefs = [
    { nameAr: ''منتجات الألبان'', nameEn: ''Dairy'', slug: ''dairy'', icon: ''🥛'', order: 1 },
    { nameAr: ''اللحوم والدواجن'', nameEn: ''Meat & Poultry'', slug: ''meat-poultry'', icon: ''🥩'', order: 2 },
    { nameAr: ''الخضروات'', nameEn: ''Vegetables'', slug: ''vegetables'', icon: ''🥦'', order: 3 },
    { nameAr: ''الفواكه'', nameEn: ''Fruits'', slug: ''fruits'', icon: ''🍎'', order: 4 },
    { nameAr: ''المخبوزات'', nameEn: ''Bakery'', slug: ''bakery'', icon: ''🍞'', order: 5 },
    { nameAr: ''المشروبات'', nameEn: ''Beverages'', slug: ''beverages'', icon: ''☕'', order: 6 },
    { nameAr: ''الوجبات الخفيفة'', nameEn: ''Snacks'', slug: ''snacks'', icon: ''🍫'', order: 7 },
    { nameAr: ''العناية الشخصية'', nameEn: ''Personal Care'', slug: ''personal-care'', icon: ''🧴'', order: 8 },
    { nameAr: ''منتجات المنزل'', nameEn: ''Household'', slug: ''household'', icon: ''🧹'', order: 9 },
    { nameAr: ''المعلبات والجاف'', nameEn: ''Canned & Dry'', slug: ''canned-dry'', icon: ''🥫'', order: 10 },
  ]
  const categories = {}
  for \(const def of categoryDefs\) {
    const cat = await prisma.category.upsert\({
      where: { slug: def.slug },
      update: { nameAr: def.nameAr, nameEn: def.nameEn, icon: def.icon, order: def.order },
      create: { ...def, isActive: true },
    }\)
    categories[def.slug] = cat
  }
  console.log\(''Categories created:'', Object.keys\(categories\).length\)

  const smDefs = [
    { name: ''Carrefour'', nameAr: ''كارفور'', slug: ''carrefour'', website: ''https://www.carrefourksa.com'' },
    { name: ''Panda'', nameAr: ''بنده'', slug: ''panda'', website: ''https://www.pandamart.com'' },
    { name: ''Lulu Hypermarket'', nameAr: ''لولو هايبرماركت'', slug: ''lulu'', website: ''https://www.luluhypermarket.com'' },
    { name: ''Danube'', nameAr: ''الدانوب'', slug: ''danube'', website: ''https://www.danubesupermarket.com'' },
  ]
  const supermarkets = {}
  for \(const def of smDefs\) {
    const sm = await prisma.supermarket.upsert\({
      where: { slug: def.slug },
      update: { name: def.name, nameAr: def.nameAr },
      create: { ...def, isActive: true },
    }\)
    supermarkets[def.slug] = sm
  }
  console.log\(''Supermarkets created:'', Object.keys\(supermarkets\).length\)

  const now = new Date\(\)
  const nextMonth = new Date\(now.getTime\(\) + 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000\)
  const flyerDefs = [
    { sm: ''carrefour'', title: ''Carrefour Weekly Offers'', titleAr: ''عروض كارفور الأسبوعية'' },
    { sm: ''panda'', title: ''Panda Best Deals'', titleAr: ''أفضل عروض بنده'' },
    { sm: ''lulu'', title: ''LuLu Weekend Sale'', titleAr: ''تخفيضات لولو نهاية الأسبوع'' },
    { sm: ''danube'', title: ''Danube Fresh Deals'', titleAr: ''عروض الدانوب الطازجة'' },
  ]
  const flyers = {}
  for \(const def of flyerDefs\) {
    const sm = supermarkets[def.sm]
    const existing = await prisma.flyer.findFirst\({ where: { supermarketId: sm.id, title: def.title } }\)
    const flyer = existing || await prisma.flyer.create\({
      data: { supermarketId: sm.id, title: def.title, titleAr: def.titleAr, startDate: now, endDate: nextMonth, status: ''ACTIVE'', totalPages: 1 },
    }\)
    flyers[def.sm] = flyer
  }
  console.log\(''Flyers created:'', Object.keys\(flyers\).length\)

  await prisma.productOffer.deleteMany\({}\)
  const productDefs = [
    { sm: ''carrefour'', cat: ''dairy'', nameAr: ''حليب الطازجة كامل الدسم'', nameEn: ''Fresh Full Fat Milk'', brand: ''الطازجة'', price: 8.5, oldPrice: 12.0, discount: 29, size: ''1 لتر'', tags: ''حليب,dairy,milk'' },
    { sm: ''carrefour'', cat: ''meat-poultry'', nameAr: ''دجاج مبرد طازج'', nameEn: ''Fresh Chilled Chicken'', brand: ''المزرعة'', price: 25.0, oldPrice: 32.0, discount: 22, size: ''1 كجم'', tags: ''دجاج,chicken,meat'' },
    { sm: ''carrefour'', cat: ''vegetables'', nameAr: ''طماطم طازجة'', nameEn: ''Fresh Tomatoes'', brand: null, price: 4.5, oldPrice: 7.0, discount: 36, size: ''1 كجم'', tags: ''طماطم,tomato,vegetables'' },
    { sm: ''carrefour'', cat: ''snacks'', nameAr: ''شيبس ليز بالملح'', nameEn: ""Lay''s Classic Chips"", brand: ""Lay''s"", price: 7.5, oldPrice: 10.0, discount: 25, size: ''160 جم'', tags: ''شيبس,chips,snacks'' },
    { sm: ''carrefour'', cat: ''beverages'', nameAr: ''عصير برتقال طبيعي'', nameEn: ''Fresh Orange Juice'', brand: ''تروبيكانا'', price: 15.0, oldPrice: 20.0, discount: 25, size: ''1 لتر'', tags: ''عصير,juice,beverages'' },
    { sm: ''panda'', cat: ''dairy'', nameAr: ''زبادي يوناني'', nameEn: ''Greek Yogurt'', brand: ''الماريكس'', price: 12.0, oldPrice: 16.0, discount: 25, size: ''500 جم'', tags: ''زبادي,yogurt,dairy'' },
    { sm: ''panda'', cat: ''bakery'', nameAr: ''خبز توست أبيض'', nameEn: ''White Toast Bread'', brand: ''ساريو'', price: 6.5, oldPrice: 9.0, discount: 28, size: ''600 جم'', tags: ''خبز,bread,bakery'' },
    { sm: ''panda'', cat: ''fruits'', nameAr: ''موز طازج'', nameEn: ''Fresh Banana'', brand: null, price: 6.0, oldPrice: 9.0, discount: 33, size: ''1 كجم'', tags: ''موز,banana,fruits'' },
    { sm: ''panda'', cat: ''beverages'', nameAr: ''ماء معدني نيوفي'', nameEn: ''Nuwafi Mineral Water'', brand: ''نيوفي'', price: 2.5, oldPrice: 4.0, discount: 38, size: ''1.5 لتر'', tags: ''ماء,water,beverages'' },
    { sm: ''panda'', cat: ''personal-care'', nameAr: ''شامبو هيد أند شولدرز'', nameEn: ''Head & Shoulders Shampoo'', brand: ''Head & Shoulders'', price: 22.0, oldPrice: 30.0, discount: 27, size: ''400 مل'', tags: ''شامبو,shampoo,care'' },
    { sm: ''lulu'', cat: ''canned-dry'', nameAr: ''أرز بسمتي ممتاز'', nameEn: ''Premium Basmati Rice'', brand: ''لولو'', price: 35.0, oldPrice: 45.0, discount: 22, size: ''5 كجم'', tags: ''أرز,rice,basmati'' },
    { sm: ''lulu'', cat: ''meat-poultry'', nameAr: ''لحم بقري مفروم طازج'', nameEn: ''Fresh Ground Beef'', brand: null, price: 45.0, oldPrice: 60.0, discount: 25, size: ''500 جم'', tags: ''لحم,beef,meat'' },
    { sm: ''lulu'', cat: ''household'', nameAr: ''سائل غسيل الصحون فيري'', nameEn: ''Fairy Dishwashing Liquid'', brand: ''فيري'', price: 18.0, oldPrice: 25.0, discount: 28, size: ''750 مل'', tags: ''غسيل,dish,household'' },
    { sm: ''lulu'', cat: ''snacks'', nameAr: ''شوكولاتة كيت كات'', nameEn: ''KitKat Chocolate'', brand: ''KitKat'', price: 4.0, oldPrice: 6.0, discount: 33, size: ''40 جم'', tags: ''شوكولاتة,chocolate,snacks'' },
    { sm: ''danube'', cat: ''vegetables'', nameAr: ''بطاطس مصرية'', nameEn: ''Egyptian Potatoes'', brand: null, price: 3.5, oldPrice: 6.0, discount: 42, size: ''1 كجم'', tags: ''بطاطس,potato,vegetables'' },
    { sm: ''danube'', cat: ''dairy'', nameAr: ''جبنة شيدر كرافت'', nameEn: ''Kraft Cheddar Cheese'', brand: ''كرافت'', price: 28.0, oldPrice: 38.0, discount: 26, size: ''200 جم'', tags: ''جبنة,cheese,dairy'' },
    { sm: ''danube'', cat: ''canned-dry'', nameAr: ''معكرونة باريلا سباغيتي'', nameEn: ''Barilla Spaghetti'', brand: ''باريلا'', price: 9.5, oldPrice: 13.0, discount: 27, size: ''500 جم'', tags: ''معكرونة,pasta,spaghetti'' },
    { sm: ''danube'', cat: ''beverages'', nameAr: ''قهوة نسكافيه كلاسيك'', nameEn: ''Nescafe Classic Coffee'', brand: ''نسكافيه'', price: 32.0, oldPrice: 42.0, discount: 24, size: ''200 جم'', tags: ''قهوة,coffee,nescafe'' },
    { sm: ''danube'', cat: ''fruits'', nameAr: ''تفاح أحمر مستورد'', nameEn: ''Imported Red Apple'', brand: null, price: 12.0, oldPrice: 18.0, discount: 33, size: ''1 كجم'', tags: ''تفاح,apple,fruits'' },
    { sm: ''danube'', cat: ''personal-care'', nameAr: ''صابون دوف بالموسترة'', nameEn: ''Dove Moisturizing Soap'', brand: ''دوف'', price: 9.0, oldPrice: 13.0, discount: 31, size: ''4 قطع'', tags: ''صابون,soap,dove'' },
  ]
  for \(const def of productDefs\) {
    await prisma.productOffer.create\({
      data: {
        flyerId: flyers[def.sm].id,
        supermarketId: supermarkets[def.sm].id,
        categoryId: categories[def.cat]?.id || null,
        nameAr: def.nameAr,
        nameEn: def.nameEn,
        brand: def.brand || null,
        price: def.price,
        oldPrice: def.oldPrice,
        discountPercent: def.discount,
        sizeText: def.size,
        tags: def.tags,
        pageNumber: 1,
        confidence: 1.0,
        isHidden: false,
      },
    }\)
  }
  console.log\(''Products created:'', productDefs.length\)
  console.log\(''Seed completed!''\)
}

main\(\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e\); process.exit\(1\) }\).finally\(\(\) => prisma.$disconnect\(\)\)
\\`;
fs.writeFileSync\(''C:/Users/dell/Downloads/smartcopons-app/prisma/seed.ts'', content\);
console.log\(''Seed file written''\);
")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) products = data.get\(''products'', {}\).get\(''data'', {}\).get\(''products'', []\) print\(f''Total records: {data[""products""][""data""][""total_records""]}''\) print\(f''Products in this page: {len\(products\)}''\) print\(f''Next page: {data[""products""][""data""][""next_page""]}''\) print\(\) # Show first product structure if products: p = products[0] print\(''=== PRODUCT STRUCTURE ===''\) print\(f''id: {p.get\(""id""\)}''\) print\(f''name: {p.get\(""name""\)}''\) print\(f''brand: {p.get\(""brand""\)}''\) print\(f''category: {p.get\(""category""\)}''\) print\(f''filter: {p.get\(""filter""\)}''\) if p.get\(''varieties''\): v = p[''varieties''][0] print\(f''price: {v.get\(""price""\)}''\) print\(f''undiscounted_price: {v.get\(""undiscounted_price""\)}''\) print\(f''show_discount: {v.get\(""show_discount""\)}''\) print\(f''discount_label: {v.get\(""discount_label""\)}''\) print\(f''discount_labels: {v.get\(""discount_labels""\)}''\) print\(f''imageURL: {v.get\(""imageURL""\)}''\) print\(f''availability: {v.get\(""availability""\)}''\) print\(f''member_price: {v.get\(""member_price""\)}''\) # Find products with discounts print\(\) print\(''=== PRODUCTS WITH DISCOUNTS ===''\) discount_count = 0 for prod in products: for var in prod.get\(''varieties'', []\): if var.get\(''show_discount''\) or var.get\(''undiscounted_price''\): discount_count += 1 if discount_count <= 5: print\(f'' Name: {prod[""name""]}''\) print\(f'' Price: {var[""price""]}''\) print\(f'' Undiscounted: {var.get\(""undiscounted_price""\)}''\) print\(f'' Discount Label: {var.get\(""discount_label""\)}''\) print\(f'' Discount Labels: {var.get\(""discount_labels""\)}''\) print\(f'' Show Discount: {var.get\(""show_discount""\)}''\) print\(f'' Image: {var.get\(""imageURL""\)}''\) print\(\) print\(f''Total with discounts in this page: {discount_count}''\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys text = sys.stdin.read\(\) # Find the category listing JSON \(second result\) start = text.find\(''{""pagination""''\) if start == -1: print\(''No product data found''\) sys.exit\(0\) # Find where the JSON ends end = text.find\(''\\n--- STATUS:''\) json_text = text[start:end] try: data = json.loads\(json_text\) print\(''=== PAGINATION ===''\) print\(json.dumps\(data[''pagination''], indent=2\)\) print\(\) if ''products'' in data: print\(''=== FIRST PRODUCT ===''\) print\(json.dumps\(data[''products''][0], indent=2\)\) print\(\) print\(''=== PRODUCT COUNT ===''\) print\(len\(data[''products'']\)\) else: print\(''Available keys:'', list\(data.keys\(\)\)\) # Check if products are under a different key for k in data.keys\(\): if isinstance\(data[k], list\) and len\(data[k]\) > 0: print\(f''Key {k}: {len\(data[k]\)} items''\) if isinstance\(data[k][0], dict\): print\(f'' First item keys: {list\(data[k][0].keys\(\)\)[:10]}''\) except Exception as e: print\(f''Error: {e}''\) ")
Bash(python -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)[:3000]\) ")
